gap: Canonical hold absence means shipment and putaway gates do not read one governed hold authority.

gap: All movements and releases need one governed hold chain.

required_closure: Release/start/putaway/issue/move commands must call hold gate and fail closed on active holds.

gap: Quality orders were not generated exactly once from governed triggers.

gap: Complaint and SCAR traces relied on mixed lanes/freeform metadata.

gap: Regulated command signature link is not written by live quality handlers.
